title: Creamy chicken livers
excerpt: These chicken livers never disappoint  An old favourite.
html: These chicken livers never disappoint An old favourite.

items: 500 g chicken livers, thawed and cleaned
10 ml chilli flakes or 2 chillies, finely chopped
125 ml chicken stock (dissolve 1 stock cube in 125 ml boiling water)
salt and pepper (go easy on the salt, as the stock cube is very salty)

steps: Fry the onion until glassy. Add the cumin, paprika and chilli flakes and fry a little longer.
Stir in the tomato paste, chicken stock and lemon juice and cook for 10 minutes.
Add the chicken livers and cook for just a short while. The chicken livers should still be pink inside.
Stir in the cream and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Eat it over rice or on a roll.
